title: Hamlet on the Holodeck
creator: Janet H. Murray
description: An updated edition of Murray’s influential account of digital media as a narrative form. It examines procedurality, participation, spatial experience, encyclopedic scope, agency, immersion, and transformation.
useful: It provides a foundational vocabulary for asking what digital stories can do differently from linear media.
audience: Narrative designers, writers, students, and critics studying the distinctive properties of interactive media.
learning: Describe procedural, participatory, spatial, and encyclopedic media
Place current narrative design in a longer digital-media argument
